payload.answer: The Brain Slack agent has progressed from planned (open) status to implemented (MVP) status. The new state supersedes the prior state. Both states are temporally valid but only the implemented state represents current reality.
payload.decision: Accept new state as superseding fact; archive prior planned state; record implementation milestone

entity_resolution.reason: Same entity undergoing legitimate state transition; prior planned state archived; current implemented state becomes authoritative

payload.intent: Resolve temporal status transition conflict: Brain Slack agent transitioning from planned (open) to implemented (MVP complete)

memory_cards.statement: The Brain Slack agent MVP is implemented
The Brain Slack agent was planned with status=open

details: Current state committed to durable memory
Entity identity preserved across state transition

repair_options: Record timestamp of transition from planned to implemented
